meta.title: Weighing the Prospective U.S.-Iran Nuclear Deal
meta.description: Lee Smith lead a panel discussion with David Albright, Michael Doran, Hillel Fradkin and Ray Takeyh on the impact of a nuclear deal with Iran. - Captured Live on Ustream at http://www.ustream.tv/channel/hudson-institute
